service.description: Trigger the Camel outbound data route. Executes the configured SQL query (typically a DeviceRequest read: DeviceRequestItem JOIN Parameter) and publishes each result row as JSON to the configured broker endpoint (MQTT v5, JMS, AMQP, etc.).

parameter.name: requestName
parameter.description: Name of the DeviceRequest whose items are read and published.

service.description: Export a Codesys TXT recipe file for the given DeviceRuleSet and Device. Queries DeviceRuleSet → DeviceRule → DeviceConfig → Parameter + ParameterDef, formats each row as "parameterName:=parameterValue" and transfers the file via the configured file.transfer.uri (SFTP, local file, or SEDA for tests).

parameter.name: deviceRuleSetId
parameter.description: ID of the DeviceRuleSet to export.

parameter.name: deviceId
parameter.description: ID of the Device for which the recipe is generated (filters DeviceRule.deviceId).

service.description: Default Moqui callback invoked after the inbound data route stores a received message to the DB.
